headline: Build momentum before the weekend trap
summary: You need -0.58 kg/week but manage -0.31 kg/week; today's eating discipline and intentional movement close that 0.27 kg/week gap.
details: Commit to portioned Huel meals today—no emotional snacking, no weekend-style eating. Hit 45 minutes on the rowing machine or treadmill to build momentum. Monday precedes your high-risk days; disciplined eating and movement today directly address your 347-day deficit and set the tone for the week ahead.
